query: Find all files with extension .py in the current directory and its subdirectories. System: Linux.

execution.verify_cmd: mkdir -p sub; touch a.py sub/b.py c.txt; OUTPUT=$({COMMAND}); if echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -q "a.py" && echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -q "b.py"; then exit 0; else echo "Found: $OUTPUT"; exit 1; fi

query: Pokaż rozmiar pliku 'data.log' w formacie czytelnym dla człowieka (human-readable). System: Linux.
Create a new directory named 'backup_project' in the current path. System: Linux.

execution.verify_cmd: {COMMAND}; if [ -d "backup_project" ]; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi

query: Rename all .txt files in the current directory to have a .bak extension. System: Linux.

execution.verify_cmd: touch file1.txt file2.txt; {COMMAND}; if [ -f file1.bak ] && [ -f file2.bak ]; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi
